title: More Nonsense Limerick 5
content:
There was an old man on the Humber,
    Who dined on a cake of Burnt Umber;
    When he said, "It's enough!" 
    They only said, "Stuff!
    You amazing old man on the Humber!"
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "More Nonsense Limerick 5"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
